prompt:
Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: premium technology logo for a live company website
Primary request: Create a unique professional logo concept for the brand name "Cubitors".
Scene/backdrop: transparent background.
Subject: icon-only monogram built from the letter C.
Style: modern geometric, premium tech, strong silhouette, vector-style, refined negative space.
Color palette: deep ink navy with restrained mint and gold accents.
Composition: centered isolated icon with generous padding.
Constraints: no wordmark, no extra text, no slogan, no shadow, no mockup, no background texture, crisp edges, scalable, favicon-ready.
